query:
SELECT * FROM commission_claims WHERE bookingId = 30134;
SELECT ph.fromStage, ph.toStage, ph.movedAt, u.name as movedBy FROM pipeline_history ph LEFT JOIN users u ON ph.movedById = u.id WHERE ph.bookingId = 30134 ORDER BY ph.movedAt DESC;
